gist.headline: T-Buddy joins the hive
gist.blurb: Navigating tricky social or professional chats just got easier. T-Buddy CHAT is now live in the greenhouse, ready to help you find the perfect words.
gist.summary: Added T-Buddy CHAT to the community showcase, an app that analyzes chat text or screenshots to suggest context and phrasing for complex conversations.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use T-Buddy CHAT to get AI-powered assistance for navigating difficult social or professional messages.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a communication assistant. She is helping the Monitor Robot write a message on a retro mobile phone. Represents the T-Buddy CHAT app's goal of assisting with complex social/professional chats.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting on a retro mobile phone and helping the chunky Monitor Robot draft a text message. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting on a retro mobile phone and helping the chunky Monitor Robot draft a text message.
